response.original_title: Cái Giá Của Sự Vĩ Đại
response.overview: Cái Giá Của Sự Vĩ Đại is a psychological neo-noir thriller that explores the thin, dangerous line between intellectual radicalism and moral decay. Borrowing thematic elements from Dostoevsky’s Crime and Punishment, the film follows a struggling student-journalist who attempts to justify a dark impulse through the lens of historical "greatness".
response.tagline: A thin line between a visionary and a monster.
response.title: Cái Giá Của Sự Vĩ Đại
